Definition: MR contrast sequence used as part of this scan protocol.
Usage note: Vocabulary to be determined, for example: Functional, structural, perfusion, diffusion, etc. or T1-weighted, T2-weighted, FLAIR etc.

Definition: Minimum and maximum value of the slice thickness in millimeters. See DICOM tag (0018, 0050) Slice Thickness
Minimum and maximum value of the inter-slice distance in millimeters. See DICOM tag (0018, 0088) Spacing Between Slices
